title: TuffBlocks
description: Adds tuff blocks from 1.21 to older versions.
body:
# TuffBlocks

TuffBlocks backports the tuff block variants from Minecraft 1.21, making tuff useful as a building block in older versions.

## What does this mod add?

TuffBlocks adds all tuff variants introduced in Minecraft 1.21.

![All tuff blocks](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/MaximeriX/TuffBlocks/refs/heads/main/screenshot.png)

## Recipes

All recipes can be found on the Minecraft Wiki: **[Tuff](https://minecraft.wiki/w/Tuff#Usage)** | **[Polished Tuff](https://minecraft.wiki/w/Polished_Tuff#Usage)** | **[Tuff Bricks](https://minecraft.wiki/w/Tuff_Bricks#Usage)**
